title: Wandering Bear

jokes.text: What does it take to be a 'Girls Gone Wild' girl? You have to show your...!
jokes.setup: Opening with sleazy commercial for exploitation videos
jokes.punchline: Cutoff mid-sentence implies nudity requirement
jokes.explanation: Cheap setup comedy relying on sexual innuendo and commercial parody

jokes.text: I can't have it sent to my house. Susie'll kill me. I don't want it sent here.
jokes.setup: Both men want porn but are afraid of their wives
jokes.punchline: Neither can receive it at home due to spousal fear
jokes.explanation: Relatable married man dynamic, well-executed

jokes.text: Oh, have you seen my Palm Pilot?
jokes.setup: Larry just hung up from ordering porn
jokes.punchline: Cheryl immediately enters asking innocent question
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing - innocent interruption right after guilty act

jokes.text: Cheryl walks in right as Larry is ordering the Girls Gone Wild video
jokes.setup: Larry is secretly ordering pornographic content
jokes.punchline: Wife appears at worst possible moment, forcing awkward transition
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and visual comedy through interruption

jokes.text: What are you watching? Just flipping around.
jokes.setup: Cheryl notices he's watching something
jokes.punchline: Larry's obvious lie about 'just flipping around'
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry deflection, well-integrated with character

jokes.text: Jeff's got this Indian guy. They're immune to it. Wandering Bear, yeah.
jokes.setup: Discussion about poison oak removal
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of stereotypical Native American name and immunity claim
jokes.explanation: Sets up character that becomes central to episode, memorable name

jokes.text: Have you noticed that we have not had sex in a very long time? I'm watching this thing about hippos.
jokes.setup: Cheryl brings up their dead sex life
jokes.punchline: Larry deflects to hippo documentary
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry avoidance behavior, absurd juxtaposition of serious topic with hippos

jokes.text: I can't use condoms. First of all, I'm embarrassed to buy 'em, and I'm not good at it.
jokes.setup: Cheryl suggests condoms as birth control
jokes.punchline: Larry admits incompetence and embarrassment about basic adult task
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry neurosis, sets up major plot point

jokes.text: I'll call and make an appointment for you to have a vasectomy
jokes.setup: Discussion of birth control options
jokes.punchline: Cheryl casually suggests surgical sterilization
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation of casual conversation to permanent surgery

jokes.text: They're going wild or something. Somebody told me about going wild.
jokes.setup: Larry awkwardly ordering porn over phone
jokes.punchline: His pathetic attempt to sound casual about 'wildness'
jokes.explanation: Larry's awkward phone manner when ordering embarrassing material

jokes.text: How can things be going so well one day and you're planning a trip, and then the next day it's over? What are those, Mentos?
jokes.setup: Antoinette pouring heart out about breakup
jokes.punchline: Larry immediately distracted by candy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry self-absorption - emotional moment derailed by trivial observation

jokes.text: Boy, that's really good. That is a hell of a candy, you know that? How do they get the essence of orange like that?
jokes.setup: Antoinette crying about breakup
jokes.punchline: Larry becomes fascinated with Mentos while she suffers
jokes.explanation: Escalates the obliviousness - detailed candy analysis during emotional crisis

jokes.text: Fill up my car with mints and gum and good fresh-breath stuff. A lot of fresh, freshness. So I'll just reach into the well and I'll just have an unlimited good breath supply.
jokes.setup: Larry giving Antoinette mundane errands
jokes.punchline: Elaborate vision of car as breath-freshening 'well'
jokes.explanation: Absurd metaphor of car as 'well' for breath supplies

jokes.text: Cancel lunch with Jason Small for me. I don't know. Tell him it's my mother's unveiling or something.
jokes.setup: Larry needs lunch cancelled
jokes.punchline: Casual suggestion to lie about dead mother's memorial service
jokes.explanation: Dark casual lying about sacred family event, sets up later callback

jokes.text: Okay, so lie and then get some treats for the car?
jokes.setup: Larry's request to lie about mother's death
jokes.punchline: Antoinette's matter-of-fact summary of immoral and trivial requests
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan summary of Larry's moral bankruptcy and trivial priorities

jokes.text: 'Girls Gone Wild,' Larry? Hey, what are you doing opening my mail?
jokes.setup: Antoinette discovers Larry received porn video
jokes.punchline: Larry's indignant response about mail privacy while caught with porn
jokes.explanation: Larry's misplaced outrage when caught red-handed

jokes.text: 'College Girls Gone Wild'? Better... they're younger.
jokes.setup: Antoinette points out it's college girls
jokes.punchline: Larry's creepy appreciation for younger participants
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable creepy comment that shows Larry's worst impulses

jokes.text: Everlast condoms, my friend. The best in the business. With those babies you're never gonna stop.
jokes.setup: Jeff proudly presenting condoms
jokes.punchline: Over-the-top sales pitch for sexual endurance products
jokes.explanation: Sets up major plot device with Jeff's enthusiasm for sexual aids

jokes.text: I want one called 'Get It Over With.' How long you think I'd want to do that for? It gets boring, come on.
jokes.setup: Jeff promoting long-lasting condoms
jokes.punchline: Larry's preference for quick sex due to boredom
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion of sexual expectations - wanting efficiency over endurance

jokes.text: Fucking's boring? It's a bore. What is it? It's enough, in and out.
jokes.setup: Jeff's shock at Larry calling sex boring
jokes.punchline: Larry's mechanical description reducing sex to basic mechanics
jokes.explanation: Larry's reductive view of sex as mundane task

jokes.text: 'I can't get them on!' 'Who's timing you?'
jokes.setup: Larry complains about condom application pressure
jokes.punchline: Jeff points out no one is actually timing him
jokes.explanation: Good logic comedy - Jeff pointing out Larry's irrational pressure

jokes.text: I don't say you got it from me. He's pissed off at me 'cause Susie doesn't want me to pay him because he went $200 over the estimate. But it's an estimate!
jokes.setup: Jeff giving Wandering Bear's contact info
jokes.punchline: Jeff's righteous indignation about the nature of estimates
jokes.explanation: Jeff's frustrated logic about estimate semantics

jokes.text: Because she knows everything about me. She knows my dietary habits. She knows about all my web of lies and bullshit and deceit.
jokes.setup: Larry explaining why he can't fire Antoinette
jokes.punchline: Casual admission of extensive personal deception
jokes.explanation: Larry's self-aware admission of his fundamental dishonesty

jokes.text: You're trapped! Oh, dear God, you're trapped!
jokes.setup: Larry's explanation of his assistant situation
jokes.punchline: Jeff's dramatic realization of Larry's predicament
jokes.explanation: Jeff's theatrical response to Larry's employment trap

jokes.text: We can go to my house and watch it. Oh, yeah, we'll have an 'Auto Focus' party.
jokes.setup: Discussing watching the porn video
jokes.punchline: Reference to movie about sex-addicted actor Bob Crane
jokes.explanation: Meta reference to film about celebrity sex addiction, darkly appropriate

jokes.text: I'm not gonna pause it. I don't like pausing. I'm not a pauser.
jokes.setup: Larry asking Jeff to pause the video
jokes.punchline: Jeff's rigid philosophy about pausing media
jokes.explanation: Absurd character trait about media consumption habits

jokes.text: Did you leave the door open? Yeah, when I... God damn it.
jokes.setup: Discovery that Oscar the dog is missing
jokes.punchline: Larry's admission of guilt about leaving door open
jokes.explanation: Sets up physical comedy sequence of looking for dog

jokes.text: I waved to a guy in a Prius and he didn't wave back. We're Prius drivers... we're a special breed.
jokes.setup: Larry notices another Prius driver
jokes.punchline: His sense of entitlement to Prius driver solidarity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry narcissism about environmental virtue signaling

jokes.text: What are you gonna do after you catch him? Nothin'.
jokes.setup: Larry pursuing non-waving Prius driver
jokes.punchline: Larry admitting he has no actual plan
jokes.explanation: Absurdity of Larry's impulsive confrontation with no purpose

jokes.text: Do not tell anyone about this. Well, he knows about it. Good thing he can't talk.
jokes.setup: Agreement to keep dog incident secret
jokes.punchline: Acknowledgment that the dog is the only witness
jokes.explanation: Ironic comment about animal witness to their misdeed

jokes.text: See, it pays to lay off that sex for a while. It kind of reminds me of when Mantle was injured in '63.
jokes.setup: Larry having successful sex after long hiatus
jokes.punchline: Comparing sexual performance to baseball injury recovery
jokes.explanation: Absurd sports analogy for sexual performance

jokes.text: I am completely numb. Down there? Yeah. I can't feel anything.
jokes.setup: Post-sex conversation
jokes.punchline: Cheryl's discovery of genital numbness
jokes.explanation: Sets up the condom mishap revelation

jokes.text: 'Everlast... lasts all night. Contains the numbing agent... lidocaine.' I must have put it on inside out.
jokes.setup: Mystery of Cheryl's numbness
jokes.punchline: Discovery of condom application error
jokes.explanation: Perfect payoff to setup - Larry's incompetence causes medical issue

jokes.text: 15-year-old boys do it every day. It's not hard! I don't use it often. I slipped it on.
jokes.setup: Cheryl's disbelief at Larry's condom incompetence
jokes.punchline: Larry's pathetic defense of his inexperience
jokes.explanation: Larry's embarrassing admission of sexual incompetence

jokes.text: Hey, that condom you gave me, Everlast? I put it on inside out by mistake. Now Cheryl's all numb in her vagina.
jokes.setup: Larry calling Jeff about the problem
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact discussion of wife's genital numbness
jokes.explanation: Larry's casual discussion of intimate medical problem

jokes.text: Oscar is not good. He's just lethargic as can be and his bark is like... emasculated.
jokes.setup: Jeff reporting on Oscar's condition
jokes.punchline: Describing dog's bark as 'emasculated'
jokes.explanation: Funny word choice for describing dog's weakened state

jokes.text: You listen and you listen good. You keep that trap shut. What did you do to this dog?! Something's wrong with Oscar!
jokes.setup: Susie discovering something's wrong with Oscar
jokes.punchline: Jeff's panic and Susie's immediate suspicion
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing the consequences catching up to them

jokes.text: It feels like it's been shot with novocaine. There's nothing.
jokes.setup: Describing her continued numbness
jokes.punchline: Medical comparison to dental anesthesia
jokes.explanation: Straightforward medical comparison for her condition

jokes.text: There's an old Indian saying, 'What goes around comes around.' You sure that's Indian? I thought that was English.
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear offers Native American wisdom
jokes.punchline: Larry questioning the cultural authenticity of common saying
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry pedantry about cultural attribution of clichés

jokes.text: I put a condom on inside out. And my wife's vagina is completely numb.
jokes.setup: Larry seeking help from Wandering Bear
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate oversharing with casual acquaintance
jokes.explanation: Larry's inappropriate sharing of intimate details with handyman

jokes.text: Larry's argument with Wandering Bear about pen vs pencil specificity
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear asks for pencil, Larry offers pen
jokes.punchline: Larry insists on acknowledging the difference despite functionality
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry obsessiveness over meaningless distinctions

jokes.text: Well, I have a pen. Same thing. Well... yeah, but you said pencil, so I just thought I'd mention that I had a pen.
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear asks for pencil and paper
jokes.punchline: Larry's unnecessary precision about writing implements
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry obsession with minor distinctions

jokes.text: Pencil has an eraser. You make a mistake, you can erase. So there's a slight difference. Some people are very specific about it.
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear says pen and pencil are the same
jokes.punchline: Larry's detailed analysis of writing implement differences
jokes.explanation: Escalates the pedantry to absurd degree during serious moment

jokes.text: Wandering Bear cured her vagina. He wrote down this thing... it's a root or something.
jokes.setup: Larry reporting back to Jeff
jokes.punchline: Casual description of folk medicine success
jokes.explanation: Matter-of-fact discussion of mystical healing

jokes.text: Wandering Bear cures vaginas? That guy is some kind of magician or something. I wish I had special powers over the vagina.
jokes.setup: Jeff's amazement at Wandering Bear's abilities
jokes.punchline: Jeff's crude wish for similar powers
jokes.explanation: Jeff's typically crude response to the situation

jokes.text: My doctor told me not to. He says it's no good for me to keep going and going. It's not good for my heart. It's a rubber for a young man.
jokes.setup: Jeff refusing the returned condoms
jokes.punchline: Medical advice against prolonged sexual activity
jokes.explanation: Funny reversal - doctor warning against too much stamina

jokes.text: The dog bit your penis so you're trying to fucking kill him? Is that what it is?
jokes.setup: Susie investigating Oscar's condition
jokes.punchline: Accusation of revenge-motivated animal abuse
jokes.explanation: Susie's aggressive accusation linking past incident to current problem

jokes.text: Wandering Bear just asked me how my vagina is.
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear's innocent medical follow-up
jokes.punchline: Cheryl's uncomfortable report of inappropriate question
jokes.explanation: Cultural clash over medical inquiry appropriateness

jokes.text: 'How is your vagina?' - Wandering Bear casually greeting Cheryl
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear checking on his medical success
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate intimate greeting in public
jokes.explanation: Perfect cringe moment - medical follow-up in worst possible context

jokes.text: The Jew generally doesn't ask other men's wives about their vagina. It's a custom thing.
jokes.setup: Larry explaining cultural differences to Wandering Bear
jokes.punchline: Overgeneralization about Jewish customs regarding intimate questions
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry cultural observation with awkward oversharing context

jokes.text: 'College Girls Gone Wild,' Cheryl, it's hot! Everybody's gonna know every lie, every deceit, every half-truth you have ever told, mister!
jokes.setup: Antoinette quitting and threatening exposure
jokes.punchline: Dramatic revelation threats while yelling about porn
jokes.explanation: Dramatic escalation of assistant's revenge threats

jokes.text: When the race begins, I'm at the finish line just like that... Quick quick, I finish quick.
jokes.setup: Marvin explaining his sexual problem
jokes.punchline: Racing metaphor for premature ejaculation
jokes.explanation: Creative metaphor for embarrassing sexual dysfunction

jokes.text: Your problems are over. All night, my friend... all night. I've just got one little word of advice for you. Don't wear it inside out.
jokes.setup: Larry offering Marvin the condoms
jokes.punchline: Advice based on his own embarrassing mistake
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback that resolves multiple plot threads with hard-earned wisdom

jokes.text: Wandering Elk, whatever the fuck your name is, you were paid already. No, she's not. You don't get out of my house, I'll get my dog.
jokes.setup: Confrontation with Wandering Bear over payment
jokes.punchline: Susie threatening to use the injured dog as protection
jokes.explanation: Ironic threat given Oscar's useless condition

jokes.text: Ahhh!
jokes.setup: Wandering Bear examining the injured dog
jokes.punchline: Oscar's voice suddenly returns with loud bark/howl
jokes.explanation: Perfect physical comedy payoff - mystical healing restores dog's voice dramatically

tmdb_overview: The purschasing of a video endangers Larry's relationship with his secretary, Antoinette, and almost kills Jeff and Susie's best friend.  Cheryl gets medical advice from an unorthodox source.
